sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_75504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cbf
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"Now Assist HRSD Plugin Status","order":"10","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_hr_gen_ai", "sn_hr_gen_ai");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for HRSD (" + "sn_hr_gen_ai" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist for HR Service Delivery is installed. AI capabilities including HR case summarization and AI-assisted routing are available."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for HRSD (sn_hr_gen_ai) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist for HR Service Delivery (sn_hr_gen_ai) not found. All Now Assist HRSD AI capabilities are unavailable."
        };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for HR Service Delivery is entitlement and plugin gated. Without the active plugin, all Now Assist HRSD capabilities including case summarization, knowledge suggestions, and AI-assisted intake are unavailable.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist for HR Service Delivery (sn_hr_gen_ai) via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm HRSD Now Assist SKU entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Volume","order":"20","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' HR cases created in last 12 months';

    if (total >= 500) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' HR cases in the last 12 months. Sufficient history for Now Assist HRSD AI summarization and similar case pattern learning.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' HR cases in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist HRSD AI learning will have limited pattern coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' HR cases in the last 12 months. Insufficient case history for Now Assist HRSD AI summarization and similar case matching.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Sufficient HR case history allows Now Assist to learn case patterns, generate accurate summaries, and power similar case suggestions. Low case volume produces generic AI outputs with minimal environment context.","remediation_guidance":"Allow HR case volume to accumulate. Focus on data quality: complete descriptions, proper categorization, and close notes. Target: 500+ HR cases in the trailing 12 months.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Resolution Notes","order":"30","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    // close_notes is the OOB resolution field on sn_hr_core_case
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed HR cases found in the last 12 months. Close notes coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('close_notes', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var populated = total - missing;
    var pct = Math.round((populated / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed HR cases have close notes (last 12 months, ' + populated + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed HR cases have close notes. Now Assist HRSD summarization has strong resolution context for AI-generated case summaries.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed HR cases have close notes (target: 80%). Now Assist HRSD summarization quality will be reduced for cases missing resolution context.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed HR cases missing close notes (' + pct + '% populated). Critical gap — Now Assist HRSD cannot generate meaningful case summaries without resolution context.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR case resolution notes are the primary training signal for Now Assist HRSD case summarization. Missing resolution notes mean Now Assist has no structured resolution context to learn from or summarize.","remediation_guidance":"Make close notes mandatory at HR case closure via UI policy. Train HR service desk agents to document resolution steps in close_notes before closing cases. Target: 80%+ of closed HR cases with close notes in the trailing 12 months.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Knowledge Base Coverage","order":"40","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    ga.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active KB articles';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published KB articles. Now Assist HRSD AI Search and case deflection have sufficient knowledge content.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles (target: 50+). Now Assist HRSD AI Search deflection coverage will be limited — expand KB content for top HR inquiry categories.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles. Insufficient knowledge content for Now Assist HRSD AI Search and self-service deflection.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist HRSD AI Search results and case deflection suggestions. Low HR KB volume means Now Assist cannot suggest self-service answers for HR inquiries.","remediation_guidance":"Create HR KB articles covering your top HR inquiry categories (benefits, payroll, policies, onboarding). Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist HRSD AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Categorization","order":"50","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed HR cases found in the last 12 months. HR Service categorization cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCat = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaCat.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaCat.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCat.addQuery('hr_service', '!=', '');
    gaCat.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCat.query();
    var categorized = gaCat.next() ? parseInt(gaCat.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((categorized / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed HR cases have HR Service populated (last 12 months, ' + categorized + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 85) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed HR cases have HR Service populated. Now Assist HRSD has strong classification signal for AI-driven routing and similar case matching.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed HR cases have HR Service populated (target: 85%). Now Assist HRSD AI routing and similar case matching will have reduced accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of HR cases have HR Service populated. Insufficient classification signal — Now Assist HRSD AI routing requires consistent HR Service categorization.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR case categories are the primary classification signal for Now Assist HRSD AI routing and similar case matching. Inconsistent or missing categorization limits AI routing accuracy and case deflection effectiveness.","remediation_guidance":"Enforce HR Service as mandatory at case creation via UI policy. Standardize HR Service values to align with Now Assist routing rules. Target: 85%+ of closed HR cases with HR Service populated in the trailing 12 months.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Assignment Group Coverage","order":"60","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    // Collect distinct assignment groups used on HR cases in last 12 months
    var usedGroups = {};
    var grCases = new GlideRecord('sn_hr_core_case');
    grCases.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    grCases.addQuery('assignment_group', '!=', '');
    grCases.query();
    while (grCases.next()) {
        usedGroups[grCases.getValue('assignment_group')] = true;
    }

    var groupIds = Object.keys(usedGroups);
    var totalGroups = groupIds.length;

    if (totalGroups === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'No assignment groups used on HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No assignment groups found on HR cases in the last 12 months. Now Assist HRSD AI routing has no group structure to route cases to.'
        };
    }

    // Check which of those groups have active members
    var groupsWithMembers = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < groupIds.length; i++) {
        var memGr = new GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember');
        memGr.addQuery('group', groupIds[i]);
        memGr.setLimit(1);
        memGr.query();
        if (memGr.next()) groupsWithMembers++;
    }

    var pct = Math.round((groupsWithMembers / totalGroups) * 100);
    var actualValue = totalGroups + ' HR assignment groups used (last 12 months) | ' + groupsWithMembers + ' with active members (' + pct + '%)';

    if (groupsWithMembers >= 3 && pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: groupsWithMembers + ' populated HR assignment groups. Now Assist HRSD AI routing has well-defined, staffed groups to route cases to.'
        };
    } else if (groupsWithMembers >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + groupsWithMembers + ' of ' + totalGroups + ' HR assignment groups have members. Now Assist HRSD AI routing may attempt to assign cases to empty groups.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No HR assignment groups have active members. Now Assist HRSD AI routing cannot function without populated assignment groups.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR assignment groups are used by Now Assist HRSD for AI-driven routing recommendations. Groups with no members create silent AI routing failures.","remediation_guidance":"Populate HR assignment groups with active agents. Assign group managers. Ensure all groups used on HR cases have at least one active member. Now Assist HRSD AI routing depends on well-populated assignment groups.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Service Catalog Coverage","order":"70","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Count active catalog items linked to HR COEs via sc_cat_item
    // Using hr_service reference which links catalog to HRSD
    var gaHR = new GlideAggregate('sc_cat_item');
    gaHR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaHR.addQuery('sc_catalogs.title', 'CONTAINS', 'HR');
    gaHR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaHR.query();
    var hrItems = gaHR.next() ? parseInt(gaHR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    // Fallback: count all active catalog items if HR-filtered returns 0
    if (hrItems === 0) {
        var gaAll = new GlideAggregate('sc_cat_item');
        gaAll.addQuery('active', true);
        gaAll.addAggregate('COUNT');
        gaAll.query();
        var allItems = gaAll.next() ? parseInt(gaAll.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
        var actualValue = '0 HR-specific catalog items found | ' + allItems + ' total active items (verify HR catalog configuration)';
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No HR-specific catalog items found. Verify HR catalog configuration — Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted intake requires catalog items for each key HR service type.'
        };
    }

    var actualValue = hrItems + ' active HR catalog items';

    if (hrItems >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: hrItems + ' active HR catalog items. Now Assist HRSD has broad catalog coverage for AI-assisted employee intake.'
        };
    } else if (hrItems >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + hrItems + ' active HR catalog items (target: 20+). Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted intake will have limited coverage for HR service types.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + hrItems + ' active HR catalog items. Insufficient catalog coverage for Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted employee intake.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR catalog items enable Now Assist HRSD to guide employees through structured HR request intake. Low catalog coverage means AI-assisted HR request fulfillment cannot be offered for most HR service types.","remediation_guidance":"Create HR catalog items for your top HR service types (benefits enrollment, leave requests, payroll questions). Target: 20+ active HR catalog items. Now Assist HRSD enhances catalog items with AI-assisted intake and guided fulfillment.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Document Management","order":"80","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_document_template');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active HR document templates';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active HR document templates. Now Assist HRSD can leverage these for automated AI-driven document generation workflows.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR document template(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist HRSD document automation will have limited coverage for AI-driven document generation.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active HR document templates configured. Now Assist HRSD document automation requires configured templates for AI-driven document generation workflows.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR document templates and digital signatures enable Now Assist to automate HR document generation and workflow. Without document management, Now Assist HRSD document automation capabilities are unavailable.","remediation_guidance":"Configure document templates for key HR processes (offer letters, employment verification, separation agreements) via sn_hr_core_document_template. Target: 5+ active templates. Now Assist can automate document generation from AI Agent workflows.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Employee Journey Management","order":"90","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_journey');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active HR employee journeys';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active employee journeys. Now Assist HRSD can provide AI-guided proactive support through key lifecycle events.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active employee journey(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD AI-guided lifecycle management will have limited event coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active employee journeys configured. Now Assist HRSD uses journeys for AI-guided proactive support through onboarding, offboarding, and lifecycle events.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Employee journeys define the multi-step HR processes Now Assist uses for AI-guided onboarding, offboarding, and lifecycle management. Without active journeys, Now Assist HRSD proactive guidance is unavailable.","remediation_guidance":"Configure employee journeys for key lifecycle events (onboarding, offboarding, leave, return to work) via sn_hr_core_journey_list.do. Target: 3+ active journeys. Now Assist HRSD can proactively guide employees through lifecycle events using AI.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case SLA Configuration","order":"100","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sla');
    ga.addQuery('table', 'CONTAINS', 'sn_hr_core');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active HR SLA definitions';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active HR SLAs. Now Assist HRSD can use SLA breach risk for AI case prioritization.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR SLA(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist HRSD SLA-based AI prioritization will have limited differentiation across case types.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active HR SLAs defined. Now Assist HRSD cannot differentiate case urgency for AI prioritization without SLA definitions.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR case SLAs provide the urgency and priority signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven case prioritization and escalation recommendations. Missing SLAs mean Now Assist cannot differentiate case urgency.","remediation_guidance":"Configure HR case SLAs for each case type and priority level. Target: 5+ active SLA definitions covering key HR service types. Now Assist HRSD uses SLA data for AI case prioritization recommendations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Short Description Quality","order":"110","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed HR cases found in the last 12 months. Short description quality cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('short_description', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var missingPct = total > 0 ? Math.round((missing / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = missing + ' of ' + total + ' closed HR cases missing short description (last 12 months, ' + missingPct + '%)';

    if (missingPct <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + missingPct + '% of closed HR cases are missing short descriptions. Now Assist HRSD has strong NLP input quality for AI classification and routing.'
        };
    } else if (missingPct <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed HR cases have no short description (' + missingPct + '% missing, target: ≤5%). Short descriptions are the primary NLP input for Now Assist HRSD classification and routing.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed HR cases missing short descriptions (' + missingPct + '%). Critical NLP input gap — Now Assist HRSD classification and AI routing accuracy will be significantly degraded.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR case short descriptions are the primary NLP input for Now Assist HRSD classification and routing. Vague or templated short descriptions produce poor AI routing accuracy.","remediation_guidance":"Train HR case creators to write specific, descriptive short descriptions. Add guidance text to the HR case creation form. Target: ≤5% of closed HR cases missing short descriptions in the trailing 12 months.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR COE Configuration","order":"120","check_script":"(function(){try{var testGr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_coe");testGr.setLimit(1);testGr.query();if(!testGr.isValid()){return{status:"not_applicable",actualValue:"HR COE table not found",finding:"HR Centers of Excellence table does not exist on this instance."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hr_core_coe");ga.addQuery("active",true);ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var count=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;var actualValue=count+" active HR Centers of Excellence";if(count>=3){return{status:"ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:count+" active HR COEs. Now Assist HRSD can provide department-aware AI case routing based on COE structure."};}else if(count>=1){return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"Only "+count+" active HR COE(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD routing will have limited organizational differentiation."};}else{return{status:"not_ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"No active HR COEs configured. COEs define the routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment."};}}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();","ai_justification":"HR Centers of Excellence (COEs) define the organizational routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment. Without COEs, Now Assist cannot provide department-aware AI routing.","remediation_guidance":"Configure HR COEs aligned to your HR organizational structure via sn_hr_core_coe_list.do. Assign HR services to appropriate COEs. Target: 3+ active COEs. Now Assist HRSD uses COE structure for AI-driven case routing recommendations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Skills and Competency Data","order":"130","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmn_skill");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmn_skill not found", finding: "Skills table (cmn_skill) is not available. Verify the Skills plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("cmn_skill");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active skill definitions";
    if (count >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD can perform competency-matched AI case assignment." };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active skill definitions (target: 10+). Now Assist HRSD skill-based AI assignment will have limited matching coverage." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Fewer than 3 active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD AI case assignment defaults to simple routing without skills data — competency-matched assignment is unavailable." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"HR skills and competency data enables Now Assist to match HR case complexity to agent expertise. Without skills data, Now Assist cannot optimize agent assignment based on capability matching.","remediation_guidance":"Populate HR agent skills and competency profiles via sn_hr_core_skill_list.do. Assign skills to HR service desk agents. Target: 10+ active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD uses skill matching for AI-optimized case assignment.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Customization Risk","order":"140","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'sn_hr_core_case');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brs = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCS = new GlideAggregate('sys_script_client');
    gaCS.addQuery('table', 'sn_hr_core_case');
    gaCS.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCS.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaCS.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCS.query();
    var cs = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brs + cs;
    var actualValue = brs + ' custom BRs + ' + cs + ' client scripts on HR case (risk score: ' + risk + ')';

    if (risk <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low HR customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions are unlikely to encounter conflicts with existing customizations.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Moderate HR customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Test Now Assist HRSD in sub-production before enabling in production to identify conflicts.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High HR customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Extensive customization on sn_hr_core_case increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Customer business rules and client scripts on HR case tables can conflict with Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions. High customization counts increase deployment risk.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_hr_core_case. Test Now Assist HRSD with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Analytics and Reporting","order":"150","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var matched = {};

    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_indicators');
        gr.addQuery('active', true);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectMatches('HR');
    collectMatches('human resources');
    collectMatches('Human Resources');

    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + ' active HR Performance Analytics indicators';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active HR PA indicators. Now Assist HRSD can provide trend-based AI insights for HR service delivery.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR PA indicator(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD trend-based insights will be limited — point-in-time analysis only for uncovered metrics.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active HR PA indicators found. Now Assist HRSD uses PA trend data for predictive HR insights — without it AI defaults to point-in-time analysis only.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR Performance Analytics indicators provide the trend data Now Assist uses for predictive HR insights and workforce analytics. Without PA data, Now Assist HRSD cannot provide trend-based AI recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Create Performance Analytics indicators for key HR metrics (case volume by category, resolution time, employee satisfaction) via pa_indicators_list.do. Target: 3+ active HR indicators. PA data enables Now Assist HRSD trend-based AI insights.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Virtual Agent Topics","order":"160","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");
gr.addEncodedQuery("active=true^published=true^topicBlockLIKEHR^ORtopicBlockLIKEHuman Resources");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" published active HR VA topics",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" published HR VA topics. More active HR topics means broader Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted self-service coverage for employee HR inquiries.":""+n+" published HR VA topics -- good coverage for Now Assist HRSD conversational AI."};
})()","ai_justification":"HR VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist HRSD can assist employees with. More published HR topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage for HR inquiries.","remediation_guidance":"Publish HR VA topics for top HR inquiry categories via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Include topics for benefits questions, leave requests, payroll, and HR policies. Now Assist enhances VA topics with AI-powered intent matching.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Sentiment Data","order":"170","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_case");
gr.addNotNullQuery("sentiment");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=100?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" HR cases with sentiment data",finding:n<100?"Only "+n+" HR cases have sentiment data. Now Assist HRSD uses sentiment for AI-driven empathetic responses and proactive escalation -- insufficient data limits this capability.":""+n+" HR cases with sentiment data -- Now Assist HRSD can leverage sentiment for empathetic AI responses."};
})()","ai_justification":"Employee sentiment on HR cases provides the wellbeing signal Now Assist HRSD uses for proactive AI escalation and empathetic response generation. Missing sentiment data limits AI empathy capabilities.","remediation_guidance":"Enable sentiment scoring on HR cases via the HRSD sentiment configuration. Train HR agents to capture feedback. Now Assist HRSD uses sentiment signals for AI-driven empathetic responses and proactive escalation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Related Records","order":"180","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('task_rel_task');
    ga.addEncodedQuery('parent.sys_class_name=sn_hr_core_case^ORchild.sys_class_name=sn_hr_core_case');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' HR case relationships in task_rel_task';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' HR case relationships. Now Assist HRSD summarization has rich relationship context for comprehensive AI-generated case summaries.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' HR case relationships (target: 50+). Now Assist HRSD summarization will have limited relationship context for AI summary depth.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' HR case relationships. Now Assist HRSD summarization uses related records for comprehensive context — encourage agents to link related cases and tasks.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR case relationships (parent cases, related incidents, linked tasks) provide context Now Assist uses for comprehensive case summarization. Isolated cases without relationships limit AI summary depth.","remediation_guidance":"Encourage HR agents to link related cases, incidents, and tasks using the Related Records tab. Configure automation to auto-link related HR cases by employee. Now Assist HRSD summarization improves with relationship context.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Confidentiality Classification","order":"190","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_case");
gr.addNotNullQuery("confidentiality");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
var gr2=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_case");
gr2.query();
var total=gr2.getRowCount();
var pct=total>0?Math.round((n/total)*100):0;
return{status:pct>=50?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of HR cases have confidentiality classification ("+n+" of "+total+")",finding:pct<50?"Only "+pct+"% of HR cases have confidentiality classification. Now Assist respects case confidentiality in AI summaries -- unclassified cases may expose sensitive HR data in AI outputs.":""+pct+"% of HR cases are confidentiality-classified -- Now Assist can apply appropriate data restrictions in AI outputs."};
})()","ai_justification":"HR cases frequently contain sensitive personal data. Proper confidentiality classification prevents Now Assist from surfacing sensitive HR information in AI summaries or search results accessible to unauthorized users.","remediation_guidance":"Configure HR case confidentiality levels via the HRSD confidentiality configuration. Assign confidentiality to cases containing sensitive employee information. Now Assist respects case confidentiality when generating summaries and search results.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"HRSD","check_name":"HR Case Worker Productivity Metrics","order":"200","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('pa_job');
    ga.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', 'HR');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active HR PA collection jobs';

    if (count >= 2) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active HR PA collection jobs. Worker productivity data is being collected — Now Assist HRSD can use workload data for AI-driven assignment optimization.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR PA collection job(s) (target: 2+). Limited productivity data collection — Now Assist HRSD workload optimization will have partial coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active HR PA collection jobs. Now Assist HRSD uses worker productivity metrics for AI-driven workload balancing — without data collection AI cannot optimize HR agent assignments.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"HR case worker productivity metrics provide the baseline Now Assist uses for AI-driven workload balancing and capacity recommendations. Without productivity data, AI workload optimization is not possible.","remediation_guidance":"Enable HR case worker metrics collection via Performance Analytics. Track cases per agent, average resolution time, and queue depth. Target: 2+ active HR PA collection jobs. Now Assist HRSD uses these metrics for AI-driven workload balancing.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>75504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cbf</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_HRSD</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_75504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cbf</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
